summary.sosovalue: Predominantly positive community sentiment around SoSoValue, driven by airdrop farming (S1 rewards, S2 anticipation), daily tasks, EXP bonuses, and platform utility for market data. Users praise rewards for real users, share referral links, and express excitement for ecosystem growth. Minor neutral promo posts.
summary.sodex: Positive buzz on SoDEX features like $SOSO deposits, API for AI trading, perp DEX points incentives (150M $SOSO allocation). Users highlight low volume as entry opportunity, seek trading help, report minor API issues resolved via Discord. Overall enthusiasm for integration with SoSoValue.
summary.ssi: Strong positive sentiment for SSI Staking (Epoch 4: TVL ~$98.5M, APY 20.76%, 488K+ holders). Users promote rewards, topping up, and index tokens like MAG7.ssi. Viewed as solid DeFi opportunity within ecosystem.
